ingredients.item: ¼ cup plus 1 teaspoon raw cane sugar
ingredients.original: ¼ cup plus 1 teaspoon raw cane sugar

ingredients.item: ¼ teaspoon plus a pinch of coarse sea salt
ingredients.original: ¼ teaspoon plus a pinch of coarse sea salt

ingredients.item: ½ cup white basmati rice, soaked in water overnight and drained well
ingredients.original: ½ cup white basmati rice, soaked in water overnight and drained well

ingredients.item: 1 cup coconut milk, plus more for drizzling
ingredients.original: 1 cup coconut milk, plus more for drizzling

ingredients.item: 1½ cups peeled and finely diced nectarines (about 5 nectarines)
ingredients.original: 1½ cups peeled and finely diced nectarines (about 5 nectarines)

ingredients.item: ½ cup peeled and finely diced peaches (about 2 peaches)
ingredients.original: ½ cup peeled and finely diced peaches (about 2 peaches)

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon finely grated lemon zest
